claims.statement: Suez Canal length is smaller than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Suez Canal length: 193 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: Cheetah sprint is faster than Speed of sound in air (~20°C).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h. Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h.

claims.statement: Great Barrier Reef length is shorter than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: There are more bones in an adult human body than keys on a standard piano.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 206 bones vs 88 keys.

viz.labelA: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: First SMS sent happened after First powered flight.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First SMS sent: 1992. First powered flight: 1903.
